name: Brown 'n' Serve Sausage
recipeInstructions:
1. The two-step cooking procedure ensures the removal of most of the fat.
2. Combine ground pork and cracker crumbs. Stir in water, sage, salt, thyme, oregano, pepper, and cloves. Mix until thoroughly combined.
3. Divide into 12 portions. Form each into a sausage-shaped roll or flat patty. Wet hands with cold water to make the job easy.
4. Place sausages or patties in a cold, lightly oiled frying pan.
5. Cook over medium heat, turning often, about 4 minutes each side until just beginning to brown and pieces are no longer pink.
6. Remove to paper towels and blot to absorb any fat. Wrap and store in the refrigerator up to 5 days or in the freezer up to 2 months.
7. To serve: Return sausages or patties to a clean, cold frying pan. Cook over medium heat, turning once or twice, about 4 minutes until sausages are brown and crisp. (Cook frozen sausages in the same manner, allowing about 2 minutes longer for cooking.)
